release_notes: Proxy auth in headless probe via CDP Fetch domain. 0.3.79 fixed navigation timing but probe with proxy still failed with Page.navigate ERR_INVALID_AUTH_CREDENTIALS — the --load-extension auth handler doesn't reliably fire in --headless=new. When profile has proxy with creds, probe now enables Fetch domain with handleAuthRequests, intercepts auth challenges at the network layer, and provides credentials via Fetch.continueWithAuth(ProvideCredentials) for proxy challenges. No extension dependency. Non-proxy probes are unchanged (reverified on Cloud4Box: 1039ms total, 40KB DOM with Intoli marker).
